title: How Kenyan Creators Get Paid Internationally: A Step-by-Step Setup Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: As a Kenyan creator, you've probably faced the frustration of selling digital products internationally only to have your payments blocked by PayPal or other payment processors. The restrictions are real, and the limitations are crippling. But what if you could sell your ebooks, courses, or software to customers worldwide without worrying about the bureaucratic red tape? You can, with blockchain-based payments and the right infrastructure.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The problem with traditional payment processors is that they rely on KYC (Know Your Customer) and AML (Anti-Money Laundering) regulations to prevent financial crime. While these measures are necessary, they also restrict access to payment services for many legitimate creators, especially in countries with limited banking infrastructure. Blockchain-based payments, on the other hand, operate on a decentralized network, allowing for peer-to-peer transactions without the need for intermediaries or KYC checks. This makes it possible for creators like you to get paid internationally without relying on traditional payment processors.
What You Need Before You Start

To set up a blockchain-based payment system, you'll need a few tools and resources. First, you'll need a cryptocurrency wallet to receive payments. You can use a hardware wallet like Ledger or a software wallet like MetaMask. Next, you'll need a payment processor that supports cryptocurrency transactions, such as NOWPayments. Finally, you'll need a delivery system to automate the distribution of your digital products. You can use a platform like Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard to manage your transactions, orders, and deliveries in real-time.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

With your tools and resources in place, it's time to set up your payment and delivery pipeline. First, integrate your cryptocurrency wallet with your payment processor to receive payments. Next, configure your delivery system to automate the distribution of your digital products. You can use Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard to set up automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. Make sure to test your pipeline thoroughly to ensure a smooth transaction process.
Blockchain-based payments are the future of international transactions, and Unchained Commerce is at the forefront of this revolution.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Now that your payment and delivery pipeline is set up, it's time to go live and make your first sale. Promote your digital products to your target audience, and make sure to include your payment information clearly. When a customer makes a purchase, your payment processor will receive the transaction and trigger the delivery of your digital product. Use Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard to track your transactions, orders, and deliveries in real-time, and respond promptly to any customer inquiries.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once your payment and delivery pipeline is running smoothly, it's time to scale your business. Use Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard to analyze your transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics to identify areas for improvement. Optimize your delivery system to reduce latency and increase customer satisfaction. As your business grows, you can use the insights from your Admin Dashboard to make data-driven decisions and stay ahead of the competition.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

The most important thing to know about using blockchain-based payments to sell digital products internationally is that you don't need a bank account or a traditional payment processor. With NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard, you can get paid instantly and automate the delivery of your digital products, making it possible to sell to customers worldwide without worrying about bureaucratic red tape.
With NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard, you can sell digital products internationally without relying on traditional payment processors.
